name: augnes-codex
description: Packages the Augnes Codex Skill for installing, enabling, diagnosing, and using Augnes memory/reuse/context in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Use Augnes memory and reuse setup prompts in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Packages the Augnes Codex Skill v0.1 for natural-language Augnes install/use onboarding. The plugin documents the existing dry-run-first user-level hook installer, manual /hooks trust requirement, and Perspective Memory Reuse Intake fallback without adding hooks, MCP servers, provider calls, storage, persistence, Codex SDK usage, GitHub mutation behavior, or automatic memory item creation.
